author: jem
review: App and website are almost unusable. Search and filtering hardly work. However, it goes beyond that. You make replacement orders without buyer consent, delay payouts intentionally, and can't even keep track of exact amounts. How is it possible that when payouts are reversed to one's wallet for whatever reason, the reversed amount is less than the initial payout? Considering the entirety of my experience with Konga recently, I can only imagine it is a deliberate attempt at defrauding customers.

author: Tochukwu Uzogu
review: After making complains about kongnow and they not delivering 1-6 hours as they said they would. I tried calling the customer care number. Wasted about 2500 airtime and each time I mention the issue on konganow, they pretend to not hear and then they hang up. I tried this with every numbers at my house. I'm disappointed at konga services and their customer care too. Now I will have to travel without the device. I also went on twitter and find out, this issue has been there for a long time.

author: Mac Donald
review: Personally I think konga operates like a scam , and they don't take their customers seriously they sent me an item that is completely not working, requested a return, now my payment is hanging . a payment I made since a week plus, I keep hearing stories from different agents even after it has exceeded the 3-5 working days, the said another 24hrs , they 24hrs has expired and I'm yet to get my refund . now the said it's a network issue. just imagine. I regret using the app.

author: Shukrah Moturayo Giwa
review: This app is the worst shopping app I've ever used. No option of complete delivery or cancel item. The delivered item is still showing shipped. It keeps logging me out. It's very frustrating to use. You guys need to do better. It has always been one issue or the other for years now.

author: Alex Couzinho
review: Not the best experience so far even though the prices are reasonable, my issue is especially when the quality of the product is bad and getting a refund is difficult. Am deleting it ASAP

author: Titilayo Deborah
review: your delivery fee is too much y re u people collecting delivery fee on each different product that Wil be delivered same day it should have been one delivery fee for many products am buying two items and am paying two times delivery fee on each product very bad

author: olanrewaju oyeleke
review: it's over decade that have been using Konga and I love the app because it is so easy to use,they sell good products and they have prompt delivery.

author: Kayode Owoseni
review: Wishlist deleted some items I saved it can be tiresome sometimes and it's recommendation feature is bizarre. why do I type in power bank and it's displaying pumping machine. I agree the first 50 items are power bank related but after typing in search only like 200 out of 2000 are power bank related

author: A Google user
review: Poor, fraudulent and disappointing online store. It is always disappointing to shop with konga. I placed order and paid for two items and waited for 17 days without shipping. I kept calling them to ship the items. But all I received was a notification that the items were out of stock. Why would konga carelessly allow out of stock items remain on the site, and then refuse to notify me untill I called them twice after 17 days? Very, very poor.

author: HARUN Y.O
review: I have used the app to order very many products. However, I noticed that orders that have since been completed are still listed in "my orders." It makes the page look very clumsy, making it stressful to scroll up and down. I mistakenly ordered an item twice because of this. I suggest that once an order is completed, it should be moved to a separate page, say my order history, and keep a separate page for current orders that are still in progress.

author: Kingsley Melekwe
review: I think so far for me, Konga takes first position among the bad online shopping platforms I have used. You order for items, it will delay before getting to you, and when it does, it is substandard items you will receive. When they manage to supply good quality, it will then be that they supply something smaller that what you actually paid for and getting the items returned is like impossible. Getting to reach the customer service needs fasting and prayers.

author: Ogo N
review: I think this is the user the most user unfriendly' app you can find out there! The app needs a serious overhaul! You can't view multiple products at once making the process very time consuming. Many times it can be slow. I couldn't even initiate a return from it. Whenever I tried to upload the pictures, it would shut down. Same way, KONGA will not allow a review to upload, which I consider fraudulent. No wonder you hardly see reviews there.

author: ammy 113
review: 1.Not all products are available to be delivered at the pickup station. 2. You add an item to cart and it'd tell u error doing that and at the end you can't add it to cart. 3. You cannot even track your item. 4. Your delivery option of home delivery is the worst. Many customers have complained of paying through cards and never got their item delivered to them, getting to months Now. 5. Your app is messed up nd too busy with so much ads and u have to login fresh everytime u make use of the app

author: Chigozirim Onyeoziri
review: Your app has been having challenges for a long time now, yet you guys has been so reluctant to fix it. You people are not serious. "Like items" stopped working for years now, nothing has been done about it. Recently, When you add items to cart and go ahead to click place order, it would either multiply the items by itself or crash before you could get to payment page. How else can one buy? And what guarantees safety for my purchased items with these kind of errors.. I am done.

author: Adedeji Shalom
review: fix this major problem with the konga app, contents of carts keeps disappearing, and it's annoying.

author: Steve Jacob
review: una dey try well well. una no dey shop people money. I have bought hundreds of items from Konga and my money never missed

author: Cam
review: Very non-chalant, terrible customer service. horrible delivery delays.

author: Josiah Peace
review: The app sucks, you can't track your orders on it, always giving "network error", fix this, it's been ages already. Also sellers on the app upload fake pictures of their products, I always pick the "pay on delivery" option so I could see the quality of the product first. I got a had made waist trainer once and had to return it instantly. Also, some orders would get cancelled but they'll still get delivered, why?? Overall, the app has a lot of glitches, pls fix this, I like shopping here.

author: ubani ugochukwu
review: It's so glitchy, unstable and disorganized especially when searching for items. It's so hard to navigate around. Often after saving items, you find out that they were never saved.. The filter area is not user friendly and doesn't have a way to set price range properly.. It only allows one to set minimum price. The sellers also state misleading prices on an item but when one view's them, they discover that the price is higher. Jumia app is way more user friendly than this hot mess of an app!

author: victoria okonkwo
review: Its almost impossible to use this app. Nothing seems to work well. There's always the error message "there's no internet connection", even when one's internet is super strong and one is able to login to other apps and sites. Most often, its impossible to access one's cart or view saved items. Konga really needs to get their acts together. The app keeps showing that an update is available when this is not so. The app is useless.

author: Miracle Eme
review: When you search for a product and try to filter the price from low-high, other unrelated products pop up. Additionally, all products don't pop up so you have to keep refreshing and this makes your search harder, because when it refreshes, it scatters all the items on the page. This problem should be rectified by ensuring that all products pop up once filtered, without the need to constantly refresh. I prefer shopping on the website due to this issue.

author: Tolulope Adesoga
review: The user interface of this platform is frustrating to the user. I picked items and proceeded to checkout, I tried to make payment using different options made available on konga, payment didn't go through. Using the card option, it requested for otp confirmation but no otp was sent to me the three times I used that option. The annoying part is that each time I go back to my cart to try and make payment again, all the items I had picked earlier are deleted from the cart. I have to pick all over

author: Genevieve Nwosu
review: Used to love the app because it made shopping easier but after the update, Everytime I try to login my password no longer works. I have even tried creating account several times still the same issue. I can't even save an item or even place an order anymore. I've made this complaint before but they didn't do anything about it. It's really frustrating for me as the system crashes after a while.

author: AkinsS
review: Your customer service team, are not doing well with my order. your logistics didn't care about customer good

author: Cynthia Johnalex
review: Konga is the worst app one can use for shopping,once u paid ur money is gone, anything they gave u ,u take, nothing like returning.big scammers.thats why .I love Jumia

author: Godspee Iyke
review: konga is the best online store, very easy to find items , and their items are more cheaper than others

author: Aisha
review: 😡😡You can expect to be frustrated while using Konga. I love it for good prices for products and delivery but they can be so unreliable. I tried to order something 4 times and each time I had to contact them because I couldn't track it and they tell me they're resolving the issue just to cancel my order and refund me. When I have a better experience, I'll change my rating.

author: chidiebube alaka
review: When I downloaded the app, I realised that each time a konga notification comes in, my phone starts ringing like I have a call, meanwhile, that is not my notification tune. So, I had to uninstall the app and install it again, but this time, I selected that I didn't want any notifications. But the app doesn't open. The error message I get is that the app can not be opened because it has a bug. I would appreciate it if the technical team looked into this. Thank you.

author: Chiamaka Dike
review: The 2 stars is for how cheap the products are. Apart from that, the app is very frustrating! Nothing seems to work. It needs a very super update. You can't click on your cart, you can add quantity, you can't view items in cart, when you select pickup station, another address follows it, the next thing, all items would leave the cart and you keep getting error messages till you restart the app. When you keep clicking on buy now to add to quantity, it doesn't reflect the quantity! Fix please!!!

author: Martha Mbah
review: I had the worst experience here ever, I thought you all had a return policy but that's a lie, bought a pack of 8 relaxers and you brought almost an expired product, called numerous times to return it but to no avail, your customer care are so wack, they keep lying on the phone that a dispatcher would come pick it up, and in your app there's nothing like cancelling of order just like Jumia, Jumia still remains the best.

author: Engr. Rasheedat Adeyemo
review: The only good thing about it is fast delivery. Searching and filtering is a nightmare. Also selected items are swapped with others (this part is annoying),why pick what i didn't select. The app needs to be reviewed. Customer care isn't available 24/7. Back button refreshes the search. Kindly look into all these to make purchasing easier and sweeter

author: Oyinkansola Oshikoya
review: I placed an order two weeks ago with payment. I am yet to receive my item. I have had multiple chats and mail with the agents.It is yet to be resolved. I need this issue resolved now.

author: Technoprenuer Jay
review: payment process is seamless. Delivery takes 1-4 days but the time can be improved. 2 days will be great. secondly, all items should be eligible for instant delivery

author: Solange Odafe
review: Only konga app that will tell me or inform me to update their app upto 10 times a week.. and it's worst after the update. Very bad service. I can't even delete items from my cart, and if I click on my choice of item into my cart its totally a different item I get to see in the cart.. please do better.. my rating was 5star in 2020, if there's an option for 0.00 I would choose that.

author: Alwayz Olatunde
review: Crashes a lot, couldn't check liked items. The experience is just frustrating. Your app is always crashing. For example, there's a notification about a product and I seem to like to check it out, after clicking on it, when it's supposed to take you to the App, then I will get "Konga app crashed". I have been trying to access the app for over 3 months now but it's still the same thing. Work on your app, it's really frustrating.

author: Prince Obafemi Adeyemi
review: It's a very bad experience, in fact it's frustrating. I couldn't log in since my first order had been delivered. Because of this, i had to created 3 different accounts, with my 3 lines. When i couldn't log in on the other one, i have to sign up another account. Immediately i opened a new one, it's saying the same thing, till I opened 3 account. It's really annoying

author: Stephen Erakpofoke
review: Downloaded the app and attempted to sign up, but each time I reach the point of where it need to send the verification code to my phone, I never did get the code. I've been trying for the past three days, still no code, meaning I can't shop with you guys.please, look into this urgently. I even tried different phone numbers that I have, still the same problem.

author: kosisochukwu Ezenwa
review: Bad experiences shopping with Konga. All my deliveries have exceeded 5 working days, as a matter of fact they take up to 2 weeks. They cancelled an order after 2 working days and was told that refund will take another 3 to 5 working days. I've tried to get a refund through the app like they directed but its not working. I'm uninstalling the app after I get my refund.

author: OkeyMedico A
review: I've never seen a group of very useless delivery agents you people have in this app or online market platform. I placed an order to pay on delivery, with a verifiable address and phone number of receiver, yet, your delivery man traveled down to to addressed location and refused to contact the receiver. Later, I received email that my delivery has failed. Then, I called the delivery number sent to me more than 15 times, no answer. Up till now, no call, no message that my item has arrived.

author: Rev,d Jesse Muyiwa-Ojo
review: I'm new but have a terrible experience trying to register and log in. Having supplied all details, verified my number and email, couldn't log in, it says " invalid logging details", " unverified number ", I'm sick of this app. My experience as a new customer is horrible. Again, I managed to buy some items, you won't believe that those items were brought to my city after about two weeks, Konga kept my orders somewhere close to my address and didn't deliver it. It's now about four weeks .

author: Babatunde Okediran
review: This is the worst e-commerce app I have ever used. After payment, app just simply stops working and you have been charged and unable to order. I tried calling the customer care, and after over 20 minutes on the phone (expensive call), the agent picked and was not loud and ended the call. I regret ever using this abomination of an app. The rating is supposed to be in the negative.

author: Imoisili Aigbogun
review: My experience with one of your ikeja outlet was very horrible, I bought a techno phone, in less than 2weeks it starting losing network. And it was for a client, the phone was returned for repairs twice and it was the same complaint. The problem wasn't fixed, neither was the phone replaced, even when it had warranty Coverage. And I lost that client because the client disposed that phone and went somewhere else buy another phone. Thanks to konga.

author: Similoluwa
review: Am just waiting patiently for my order to be delivered so I can uninstall the app, The app is slow and annoying apart from those I ordered an item and it was scheduled for 7 days this is the 9th day an am still waiting, I didn't receive any call or message or update on my order and when you track the item it's just in one position all this while 🤦....who will I report to😓( Don't even bother to improve, don't worry I don't need it)

author: Sabbath Anew Adu
review: Awful awful, God awful app. And some sellers ship whatever they like, because the buyer can't inspect before payment. Shoddy. Nasty. Unforgivable. Especially as returns are cumbersome to make, then you have to drop off yourself. The guilty seller is not stressed. Konga does offer competitive prices and free delivery on some items, regardless of price.

author: Yakubu
review: This has to be the worst app I've ever had to use, the website was terrible and I thought just maybe the app might be better...it turned out to still be rubbish. To register is a hurdle, to login with your registration details is another annoying process that might require sending a "forgotten password" to their team several times. To eventually place and order and pay successfully 🤦🏽‍♂️.....at this point you'd wonder how safe your payment would even be and uninstall the app 😂😂. 0 stars

author: Oweisi Dogubo
review: This is very disappointing that one would make an order and make payment immediately and still be unable to track the order. I have written several emails, contacted the help desk via WhatsApp and still, no reasonable reaponse. This is not the first time something like this is happening, then after 2 weeks then you will now start all over again without getting a refund. This time around, I will drag this issue to the last and collect every single penny spent including bank charges and more.

author: Sodiq Kazeem
review: The platform is now full of robbery and false information on products. And the platform is also full of lies and empty promise. One needs to be careful of what you ordered, imagine I ordered 4 different items, then I was charged for delivery on each one only for them to deliver the wrong size I ordered. Till now the platform is only giving false hope of retrieving the item, over 3 weeks now. Am highly disappointed

author: uche sunday
review: The app is good with lots of items, but still have a long way to go.. Like can't track an order that is placed successfully. Just only showing the details of order. Even I can't easily cancel a ready made order, and it is frustrating. And review in the sales are not real. You can't make a review to the public to see because it might crash the sale

author: Ishaq Apalando
review: This app gives an awful shopping experience. I always end up using my laptop. Points to note: Keeps complaining of Cart error - Items in the cart just disappear (happens on the web, too, and it's not because of out of stock because I get to readd the same item all over) - No general share button (even the 3 share options are buggy - Large (accessibility) fonts not supported - No dark mode Just copy the Jumia app which is manageable.

author: D-Great Agunloye
review: The application is super unstable. The UI is unusable, the loading time of the app and search result is slower than using a 2G network. Please fix this, the application used to be fluid and active. The same goes for your website, it seems to run the same as the application. Don't make this issue make people to move to other alternatives, I enjoy your services more than others.

author: Stanley Nwaubani
review: I ordered two different items from your app and the wrong item was delivered to me, I've complained several times to you people and you have not taken any reasonable action to rectify this issue. I've also been calling the dealer (Golden Kitchen) and they knowing very well that they sold the wrong items refused to pick their calls... On testing this item for use I realized that it wasn't even working and the item also seemed like a used item. I leave you and that Golden Kitchen to God...

author: A Google user
review: How come when i search for a particular item, i get bombarded with irrelevant things. Please fix your search option. I can't be searching for Samsung and you people keep putting iPhone in the mix. Sort out your database!!! Ridiculous. I think you people have lost it. Money got the better of you guys, just like every Nigerian institution, great beginnings but can't keep up with the competition. Scrap!!!

author: vonetta louis
review: I am having trouble placing an order. The system is too complex and not swift. I have tried ordering for an item 3 times, not sure if it fails or goes, I simply can't tell because after entering my number /Email and expecting to use the ussd code, It disappears and says order has been placed. No traces of placed order or transaction! You also try to contact them, it says Network error and my network is perfectly fine. Such a horrible glitch!! I don't have issues like this on Jumia!!!

author: Chioma Okoye
review: Won't let me login almost a week now. Its bad you can't shop as guest so if something is wrong and you can't login, you don't get to shop. Dont get me started on alot of fake adverts. You dont always get what is advertised. Not to mention damaged items frequently received and they never help with exchanges or refunds. The app is tedious but what's worse is not getting any help with damaged goods.

author: Mahadsdq
review: Worst Customer Service, they've got the worst Customer Service ever! How can you call customer care service after waiting on the que, have no customer service attend to you. You can't even cancel an order from the app nor the customer care (that's if they even pick up) They don't respond to emails. I was thinking maybe it was because of the Christmas and New Year but it turned out that I was wrong. My colleagues had no issues using Konga but I don't know why it's a different case for me.

author: A Google user
review: This app denied me the chance to make payment on Konga from the past two weeks to date. The response I get is "Error! cannot initiate transaction, check your transactiin parameters". I sent an email to konga support team but the response I got was 'I've checked your account, there's nothing wrong with it, kindly refresh and try again else, you can make transfer to konga and email us the product and payment details'

author: N - SAYN
review: yall should fix ur app, it keeps buffering on everything

author: Joseph Essien
review: honestly konga doesn't deserve the one star I'm giving because it's as useless as they come. how can I place order on one product twice without movement but instead I kept getting spam calls from their fraudulent so called WhatsApp number without the operator saying anything beyond introducing herself. then of chance I went to their app to check on the progress of my order to my surprise, it was cancelled. GET OUT OF THE BUSINESS if you don't know how to operate it!!!

author: seyi olufemi
review: Frustrating, disturbing, annoying and in the end useless. Ordered 4 items and when they came the quality was not okay. Tried for 2 months to return 3 of them and complained, sent pictures, mails, WhatsApp messages and in the end they simply said they can't collect it back. They kept telling me they didn't receive my messages which I believe was lies. Was forced to keep the items but this is the last time I will ever order on this platform. I would have loved to give them no star.

author: Adora
review: Very POOR service. Takes a really long time to confirm orders and doesn't confirm some at all. It lags a lot and it's not user friendly. I like that payment can be done through bank transfers but overall, this app is not good. I don't recommend it to anyone. I rate it one star for good interface design. The service is very bad and there's no communication at all. Bad customer service. I prefer jumia, although I recieved my order, it was a horrible experience.
